evidence_summary: The docs-only item-1 freeze binds the predecessor authority chain, freezes `sameLaneDoubleAliasFrameClearBoundaryExpr` with an exact shared `PipelineTypeCheckError (TCLetTypeMismatch ...)` live read on both authoritative entrypoints, and keeps the item-2 writable slice fail-closed around `src/MLF/Elab/TermClosure.hs` plus focused packet tests.
